mapper.select: select c.id, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at, u.nickname, u.avatar_url from cook_comments c inner join cook_users u on u.id = c.user_id and u.deleted_at is null where c.id = #{id} and c.deleted_at is null limit 1

select c.id, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at, u.nickname, u.avatar_url from cook_comments c inner join cook_users u on u.id = c.user_id and u.deleted_at is null where c.target_type = #{targetType} and c.target_id = #{targetId} and c.status = 'normal' and c.deleted_at is null order by c.created_at asc, c.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into cook_comments (target_type, target_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status) values (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.update: update cook_comments set like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_comments set like_count = greatest(like_count - 1, 0), updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
